vision_profile.current_state: Harsh is a 25-year-old Mobile Repair Shop Assistant in Rajkot with 2 years of experience, earning 16000 INR/month. He has basic Android usage and self-learning skills from YouTube.
vision_profile.main_blocker: Harsh fears that without a formal engineering degree, his coding work won't be taken seriously, and he lacks practical skills in responsive design, JavaScript events, domain/hosting, and client project delivery.
vision_profile.vision_12mo: Within 12 months, Harsh aims to become a Web Developer Intern, earning 22000 INR/month, capable of building small client websites and generating freelance income for local businesses.
vision_profile.top_motivation: He is motivated to gain a valuable skill that can bring freelance income by building websites for small businesses in his city.

milestones.identity_label: Your First Steps in Web Development
milestones.identity_statement: Start your exciting journey into web development by mastering the core building blocks of every website.
milestones.market_value_display: Ready for basic web tasks, 0-1 LPA potential

modules.title: HTML - The Structure of the Web
modules.description: Learn how to build the basic structure and content of any webpage using HTML.

skills.title: HTML Page Structure
skills.description: Understand the fundamental tags like <html>, <head>, <body>, and how to organize your web page.

scenario.title: Build a Basic HTML Document

skills.title: Text & List Elements
skills.description: Learn to format text with headings, paragraphs, and create ordered/unordered lists.

video.title: Adding Text and Lists to HTML

scenario.title: Create a Recipe Page with Lists

skills.title: Links & Images
skills.description: Discover how to add images and create links to navigate between pages or external sites.

scenario.title: Build a Simple Photo Gallery

modules.title: CSS - Styling Your First Pages
modules.description: Learn to make your websites look beautiful and professional using CSS.

skills.title: CSS Selectors & Properties
skills.description: Understand how to target HTML elements and apply styles like colors, fonts, and backgrounds.

scenario.title: Style a Blog Post with CSS

skills.title: Box Model & Layout
skills.description: Learn about margins, padding, borders, and how to arrange elements on your page using Flexbox.

video.title: CSS Box Model and Flexbox Layout

scenario.title: Design a Product Card Layout

skills.title: Basic Responsive Design
skills.description: Make your websites look good on mobile phones and tablets using media queries. (Addresses skill gap)

video.title: Responsive Web Design with Media Queries

scenario.title: Make a Landing Page Mobile-Friendly

modules.title: Essential Tools & Workflow
modules.description: Get comfortable with the tools that professional web developers use every day.

skills.title: Using a Code Editor
skills.description: Learn to use Visual Studio Code for efficient coding, including basic shortcuts and extensions.

video.title: VS Code for Web Development Basics

scenario.title: Set Up Your First VS Code Project

skills.title: Browser Developer Tools
skills.description: Learn to inspect and debug your HTML and CSS directly in the browser.

scenario.title: Fix a Layout Issue Using DevTools

milestones.identity_statement: Transform static pages into dynamic and interactive experiences, making your websites engaging and powerful.
milestones.market_value_display: Junior Web Developer Intern, 1-2 LPA potential

modules.title: JavaScript Basics
modules.description: Learn the fundamental concepts of JavaScript to add interactivity to your web pages.

skills.title: JS Variables & Data Types
skills.description: Understand how to store and manage information using variables and different data types in JavaScript.

scenario.title: Calculate a Simple Bill Total

skills.title: Conditional Logic & Loops
skills.description: Learn to make decisions in your code with if/else statements and repeat actions with loops.

scenario.title: Create a Simple Guessing Game

skills.title: Functions & Arrays
skills.description: Organize your code with functions and manage collections of data using arrays.

scenario.title: Manage a To-Do List with Arrays

modules.title: DOM Manipulation & Events
modules.description: Learn how to make your web pages respond to user actions and change dynamically.

skills.title: Selecting DOM Elements
skills.description: Discover how to find and select specific HTML elements using JavaScript.

scenario.title: Select and Log Page Elements

skills.title: Modifying HTML & CSS
skills.description: Change the content, attributes, and styles of HTML elements dynamically using JavaScript.

video.title: Changing Content and Styles with JS

scenario.title: Create a Dynamic Image Carousel

skills.title: JavaScript Events
skills.description: Make your website interactive by responding to user clicks, keyboard inputs, and other events. (Addresses skill gap)

video.title: Handling User Interactions with JS Events

scenario.title: Build an Interactive Light/Dark Mode Toggle

modules.title: Practical UI Components
modules.description: Apply your JavaScript knowledge to build common user interface elements.

skills.title: Building a Simple Form
skills.description: Create interactive forms with basic validation using HTML and JavaScript.

scenario.title: Build a Contact Us Form

skills.title: Interactive Navigation Menu
skills.description: Create a responsive navigation menu that works well on both desktop and mobile devices.

video.title: Building a Responsive Navbar with JS

scenario.title: Implement a Mobile 'Hamburger' Menu

milestones.identity_statement: Gain the confidence to deliver real projects, turning your coding skills into valuable freelance opportunities.

modules.title: Project Setup & Deployment
modules.description: Learn how to manage your code and put your websites online for the world to see.

skills.title: Git & GitHub Basics
skills.description: Understand version control with Git and how to host your code on GitHub.

scenario.title: Push Your First Project to GitHub

skills.title: Domain & Hosting Basics
skills.description: Learn what domains and hosting are, and how to choose them for your client projects. (Addresses skill gap)

scenario.title: Choose a Domain and Hosting Plan

skills.title: Deploying a Static Site
skills.description: Learn to publish your HTML, CSS, and JavaScript website online using simple hosting services.

scenario.title: Deploy Your Portfolio Website

modules.title: Client Communication & Delivery
modules.description: Develop the soft skills needed to work with clients and deliver successful web projects.

skills.description: Learn to listen to clients, ask the right questions, and translate their ideas into web project requirements.

video.title: Client Discovery: Asking the Right Questions

scenario.title: Interview a Mock Client for a Website

skills.title: Presenting Your Work
skills.description: Learn to showcase your website to clients effectively, explaining features and design choices.

scenario.title: Present a Website Draft to a Client

skills.title: Client Project Delivery
skills.description: Master the process of handing over a completed website, including documentation and final checks. (Addresses skill gap)

scenario.title: Prepare a Client Handover Document

modules.title: Building a Portfolio Project
modules.description: Create a complete website project to showcase your skills and attract potential clients.

skills.description: Apply all your learned skills to build a complete, functional website for a local business.

scenario.title: Develop a Website for a Local Cafe

skills.description: Ensure your portfolio project is fully responsive and looks great on all devices, from phones to desktops.
